channel.title: Rx Shortage Radar
channel.description: Latest public FDA drug shortage records from openFDA.

item.title: Current: Amphetamine Aspartate Monohydrate, Amphetamine Sulfate, Dextroamphetamine Saccharate, Dextroamphetamine Sulfate Tablet (0185-2098-01)
item.description: Dextroamp Saccharate, Amp Aspartate, Dextroamp Sulfate And Amp Sulfate, Tablet, 1.25 mg; 1.25 mg; 1.25 mg; 1.25 mg (NDC 0185-2098-01) Status: Current Updated: 2026-05-11 Company: Sandoz Inc.
